titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 5
Books of Kings; Chronological list of the kings of Israel and Judah and of the prophets; Ethiopic explanation of several Hebrew names; Books of Chronicles, Prayer of Manasses, Kǝbra Nagaśt

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Books of Kings
msItem.note: The text agrees generally with that of Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 2 and of Biblia Veteris Testamenti Aethiopica, in quinque tomos distributa, ad librorum manuscriptorum fidem edidit et apparatu critico instruxit Dr. A.D., Professor Tubingensis. Veteris Testamenti Aethiopici Tomus Primus, sive Octateuchus Aethiopicus. Ad librorum manuscriptorum fidem edidit et apparatu critico instruxit Dr. A. D., Professor Tubingensis, Impensarum partem suppeditante Societate Germanorum OrientaliChristian Friedrich AugustDillmannLipsiaeSumptibus Fr. Chr. Guil. Vogelii, Typis Guil. Vogelii, Filii1853http://digitale-sammlungen.ulb.uni-bonn.de/content/titleinfo/121591BibleOld TestamentOctateuchbm:Dillmann1853OctateuchBibleOld TestamentOctateuchbm:Dillmann1853Octateuch

msItem.title: Book of Samuel 1 = (Ethiopic) Book of Kings 1
msItem.note:
In Chapters 1 and 2 there are the following variants compared to Biblia Veteris Testamenti Aethiopica, in quinque tomos distributa, ad librorum manuscriptorum fidem edidit et apparatu critico instruxit Dr. A.D., Professor Tubingensis. Veteris Testamenti Aethiopici Tomus Primus, sive Octateuchus Aethiopicus. Ad librorum manuscriptorum fidem edidit et apparatu critico instruxit Dr. A. D., Professor Tubingensis, Impensarum partem suppeditante Societate Germanorum OrientaliChristian Friedrich AugustDillmannLipsiaeSumptibus Fr. Chr. Guil. Vogelii, Typis Guil. Vogelii, Filii1853http://digitale-sammlungen.ulb.uni-bonn.de/content/titleinfo/121591BibleOld TestamentOctateuchbm:Dillmann1853OctateuchBibleOld TestamentOctateuchbm:Dillmann1853Octateuch:
Chapter 1:1: ብእሴ፡ ዘእምነ; አፍሬም፡ ; ሐልቃና፡ ; ኢያሬም፡ ያል፡ ; ቶቄብናሴ፡ ዘአፍሬም።
1:3: እምነ፡ አርማቴም፡; ወመጽአ፡ ኤሊ፡
1:4: ወወሀቦን፡ ክፍሎን፡
1:5: እምነ፡ እንታክቲ፡
1:6: በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ; ዐጸዋ፡
1:8: ነየ፡ አነ፡ እግዚእየ፡ ምንተ፡ ኮንኪ፡ ወምንተ፡ ያበኪየኪ፡
1:9:ወኤሌ፡
1:11: ብፅዓተ፡ ; ወእሁብ፡ ; ወወይነ፡; ኢይዐርግ፡
1:12: ወኤልሰ፡ ; ይትዓቀብ፡
1:13: ወኢሰምዓ፡
1:14: ስክረትኪ፡ ; ወይንኪ፡
1:15: ወተሠጠወቶ፡ ; እግዚእየ፡
1:16: እምነ፡ ብዙኅ፡
1:17: ስእለትኪ፡
1:18: ቅድሜከ፡ ; ወኢየውደቀት፡
1:19: ወይሰግዱ፡ ; ወየሐውሩ፡ ፍኖቶሙ፡
1:21: ይሡዑ፡; መዋዕለ፡
1:23: ለአዕይንቲኪ፡
1:24: ዘ፫፡ ዓመት፡ ; ኢፍ፡
1:25: መሥዋዕተ፡
1::26: ወትቤ፡ is missing; ሕይወተ፡
Chapter 2:1: ወተላዐለ፡ ቀርንየ፡ በአምላኪየ። ወርኅበ፡ አፉየ፡ ዲበ፡
2:2: ዘእንበሌከ፡ እግዚኦ።
2:3: እምነ፡ አፉክሙ፡ ዐቢየ፡ ነገረ። ; እግዚኣብሔር፡ ያስተዴሉ፡ ምግባሮ።
2:5: ስእነት፡ በወሊድ።
2:7: ያብዕል፡ ወያነዲ፡
2:8: እምነ፡ ምድር፡ ; ምስለ፡ ዐቢያን፡ ; ክብሩ፡
2:10: ያደውዮ፡ ; ወኢይትመካሕ፡ ጠቢብ ; ወገብረ፡ ፍትሐ፡ ; መሲሑ፡ is missing
2:11: ህየ፡ is missing; ውስተ፡ አርማቴም፡ ; ይትለአከ፡
2:13: መኆሠሠ፡
2:14: እመኒ፡; ጽሀርት፡ (but later ጽህርት፡ ); ወኵሉ፡ ; መኆሠሥ፡
2:15: ሀበነ፡ ሥጋ፡
2:16: ወይብሎ፡ ; ዘበሕግ፡ ; አሀይደከ፡
2:17: በቅድመ፡ ; ዐቢይ፡
2:19: ዐጽፋ፡
2:20: ወይቤሎሙ፡
2:21: ወካልኤ፡ አዋልደ፡
2:23: ዝንቱ፡ ነገር፡
2:25: ላዕለ፡ ብእሲ፡ is missing; ይጼልዩ፡ ኀበ፡
2:26: ወልድ፡is missing
2:27: አግብርቱ፡
2:28: ካህናትየ፡ ወይዕርጉ፡ ውስተ፡ መሥዋዕትየ፡
2:29: ቀዳሚ፡ ኵሎ፡ ; በዘ፡ ቅድሜየ፡
2:30: ትከብሩ፡ በቅድሜየ፡ ; አክበሩኒ፡ አከብር፡ ; አስተኀቅር፡
2:31: ወእሤርዎን፡
2:32: ወኢትረክብ፡ ; ልሂቀ፡
2:33: በኲናት፡
2:34: አፍኒ፡ ወፊናሐስ፡
2:35: መዋዕልየ፡
2:36: ተርፉ፡is missing; በብሩር፡ ; ወይብሉ፡ ; እምነ፡ ክህነት፡

msItem.title: Book of Samuel 2 = (Ethiopic) Book of Kings 2
Chronological list of the kings of Israel and Judah and of the prophets
Ethiopic explanation of several Hebrew names
msItem.incipit: ኤሎሄ፡ ብሂል፡ አምላከ። ኣዶናይ፡ ብሂል፡ እግዚእ። ፀባኦት፡ ብሂል፡ ዘኀይላት።

msItem.title: 1 Chronicles
msItem.note: There are rubrics in the upper and lower margins

msItem.title: Kǝbra nagaśt
msItem.note: There are no chapter divisions. bibl.title: Kebra Nagast: Die Herrlichkeit der Könige, Nach den Handschriften in Berlin, London, Oxford und Paris, zum ersten Mal im äthiopischen Urtext herausgegeben und mit deutscher Übersetzung versehen von Carl Bezold
Abhandlungen der philosophisch-philologischen Klasse der Königlich Bayerischen Akademie der Wissenschaften
bibl.publisher: Verlag der K. B. Akademie der Wissenschaften in Kommission des G. Franz’schen Verlags (J. Roth)

series.title: Abhandlungen der philosophisch-philologischen Klasse der Königlich Bayerischen Akademie der Wissenschaften

supportDesc.condition: Between and as well as between and a leaf is missing.

handNote.date: 13th century according to Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationaleManuscrits OrientauxHermannZotenbergParisImprimerie nationale1877Manuscrits Orientauxhttps://archive.org/details/manuscritsorient00biblEthiopicCataloguingBibliothèque Nationalebm:Zotenberg1877CatalogueEthiopicCataloguingBibliothèque Nationalebm:Zotenberg1877Catalogue9a.

14th century at the latest according to Kebra Nagast: Die Herrlichkeit der Könige, Nach den Handschriften in Berlin, London, Oxford und Paris, zum ersten Mal im äthiopischen Urtext herausgegeben und mit deutscher Übersetzung versehen von Carl BezoldAbhandlungen der philosophisch-philologischen Klasse der Königlich Bayerischen Akademie der WissenschaftenCarlBezoldCarlBezoldMünchenVerlag der K. B. Akademie der Wissenschaften in Kommission des G. Franz’schen Verlags (J. Roth)1905Abhandlungen der philosophisch-philologischen Klasse der Königlich Bayerischen Akademie der Wissenschaften23, Denkschriften, 7723, Denkschriften, 77http://digital.bib-bvb.de/view/bvb_mets/viewer.0.6.5.jsp?folder_id=0&dvs=1628074224193~511&pid=1792706&locale=de&usePid1=true&usePid2=truebm:Bezold1905KebraNbm:Bezold1909KebreNagastbm:Bezold1905KebraNbm:Bezold1909KebreNagastIX.
15th century according to Rectification paléographique: Âge du ms. éthiopien N. 5 de ParisAethiopsSylvainGrébaut19303114bm:Grebaut1930Rectificationbm:Grebaut1930Rectification.

First half of the 15th century according to ‘Orthodox’ Faith and Political Legitimization of a ‘Solomonic’ Dynasty of Rulers in the Ethiopic Kebra Nagast. Essays Presented in Honour of Professor Robert W. Thomson on the Occasion of His Eightieth BirthdayThe Armenian Apocalyptic Tradition. A Comparative PerspectivePierluigiPiovanelliKevork B.BardakjianSergioLa PortaLeiden–BostonBrill2014688-705bm:Piovanelli2014Kebrabm:Piovanelli2014Kebra689–6908.
handNote.seg: Very beautifully written, cp. Kebra Nagast: Die Herrlichkeit der Könige, Nach den Handschriften in Berlin, London, Oxford und Paris, zum ersten Mal im äthiopischen Urtext herausgegeben und mit deutscher Übersetzung versehen von Carl BezoldAbhandlungen der philosophisch-philologischen Klasse der Königlich Bayerischen Akademie der WissenschaftenCarlBezoldCarlBezoldMünchenVerlag der K. B. Akademie der Wissenschaften in Kommission des G. Franz’schen Verlags (J. Roth)1905Abhandlungen der philosophisch-philologischen Klasse der Königlich Bayerischen Akademie der Wissenschaften23, Denkschriften, 7723, Denkschriften, 77http://digital.bib-bvb.de/view/bvb_mets/viewer.0.6.5.jsp?folder_id=0&dvs=1628074224193~511&pid=1792706&locale=de&usePid1=true&usePid2=truebm:Bezold1905KebraNbm:Bezold1909KebreNagastbm:Bezold1905KebraNbm:Bezold1909KebreNagastIX.
handNote.note: The dating to the 13th century is impossible to maintain, see Kǝbrä nägäśtEAeEncyclopaedia AethiopicaPaoloMarrassiniSiegbertUhligWiesbadenHarrassowitz Verlag2007III364a-368abm:Marrassini2007EAEKebraNbm:Marrassini2007EAEKebraN365b.

item.desc: Note mentioning the names of some of the manuscript's owners, Walda Giyorgis Wasan Sagad and his father Tewodros
item.q: ነገሥተ፡ ክብረ፡ ነገሥት፡ ኅፁፃን፡ ናቸው፡ ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘወልደ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ወሰን፡ ሰገድ፡ ውአቡሁ፡ ቴዎድሮስ።

item.desc: The rubrics have been added on the top of the pages and the lower margins.

Manuscrits Orientaux

B. Akademie der Wissenschaften in Kommission des G. Franz’schen Verlags (J. bibl.title: Rectification paléographique: Âge du ms. éthiopien N. 5 de Paris
Aethiops

‘Orthodox’ Faith and Political Legitimization of a ‘Solomonic’ Dynasty of Rulers in the Ethiopic Kebra Nagast. Essays Presented in Honour of Professor Robert W. Thomson on the Occasion of His Eightieth Birthday
The Armenian Apocalyptic Tradition. A Comparative Perspective
Le Kebrä Nägäśt, ‘La Gloire des Rois’, compte rendu critique de quatre traductions réecentes
Annales d’Éthiopie

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: foreign added and rubric changed to note
Added bibliographic reference suggested by Carsten Hoffmann

ab.l: ወኢሎፍሊኒ፡ በእልክቱ፡ በዓል፡ ገብሩ፡ ቀትለ፡ ምስለ፡ እስራኤል፡ ወእስራኤልኒ፡ ጐዩ፡ እምገጾሙ ለኢሎፍሊ፡ ወወደቁ፡ ቅቱላን፡ እስራኤል፡ በደብረ፡ ግሉቡይ፡
ወሰደድዎሙ፡ ኢሎፍሊ፡ ለሳኦል፡ ወለደቂቁ፡ ወቀተልዎ፡ ኢሎፍሊ፡ ለኢዮታን፡ ወልዱ፡ ለሳኦል፡ ወለአሚናዳብ፡ ወለመልካሱዕ፡ ደቂቀ፡ ሳኦል፡
ወከብደ፡ ጥቀ፡ ቀትል፡ ዲበ፡ ሳኦል፡ ወረከብዎ፡ ነዳፍያን፡ በነዲፍ፡ ወበጻማ፡ ወሐመ፡ ጥቀ፡ እምኀበ፡ አቅስስቲሆሙ።

ወአውሥአ፡ ሳኦል፡ ወይቤሎ፡ ለዘ፡ አልዐለ፡ ንዋየ፡ ሐቅሉ፡ እምላሕ፡ እንከ፡ ሰ፡ ሰይፈ፡ ወርግዘኒ፡ ቦቱ። ወኢይምጽኡ፡ እሉ፡ እለ፡ ኢኮኑ፡ ግዙራን፡ ወኢይሳለቁ፡ ለዕሌየ፡ ወኢፈቀደ፡ ውእቱ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘአንሥአ፡ ንዋየ፡ ሐቅል፡ ከመ፡ ይቅትሎ፡ እስመ፡ ብዙኀ፡ ይገርም፡ ቀቲሎቱ፡ ወመልሐ፡ ሳኦል፡ ሰይፎ፡ ወአቀመ፡ ወወደቀ፡ ለዕሌሁ፡
ወርእየ፡ ዝኩ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘአንሥአ፡ ንዋየ፡ ሐቅሉ፡ ከመ፡ ሞተ፡ ሳኦል፡ ወውእቱኒ፡ ወደቀ፡ ውስተ፡ ሰይፉ፡ ወሞተ።
